about.heading: About Petaluma Pie Company
body: Petaluma Pie Company makes sweet and savory pies from scratch using local and organic ingredients — the kind of pie you'd make at home if you had all day. Order online and pick up fresh at our shop in downtown Petaluma.

services.title: Sweet pies
services.description: Seasonal fruit and cream pies made from scratch with local and organic fruit.

services.title: Savory pies
services.description: Hand pies and savory pot pies — a whole meal you can hold in one hand.

services.title: Whole pies to order
services.description: Order a whole pie for the holidays, a party, or just because.

services.title: Online ordering & pickup
services.description: Order online and pick up fresh at our shop in downtown Petaluma.

items.a: Hours can vary — give us a call at (707) 766-6743 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Petaluma, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
